div1.entryFree: Engraffed (cf. Graff), rooted, fixed deep and firm: the imperfections of long e. condition. Lr. I, 1, 301 (Qq engrafted). one of an e. infirmity, Oth. II, 3, 145 (Edd. ingraft). Followed by to, == firmly attached, grown into one: so much e. to Falstaff, H4B II, 2, 67 (cf. Enrooted).
